title: P113 Gifts and Income Tax 2025 - Canada.ca
content:
## P113 Gifts and Income Tax 2025
Information for individuals about making a gift in the year, and about gifts made in the
    previous year. Tax consequences, credits, qualified donees.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format p113-e.html PDF p113-25e.pdf Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2024 – Standard print PDF
